---
marp: true
style: |
  .glow {
    text-shadow: 0 0 20px cyan, 0 0 40px cyan;
  }
  .drop-shadow {
    text-shadow: 3px 3px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  }
  .no-shadow {
    text-shadow: none;
  }
---

<!-- Slide 1: Glow effect -->
# <span class="glow">Glowing Title</span>

---

<!-- Slide 2: Drop shadow -->
# <span class="drop-shadow">Shadow Title</span>

---

<!-- Slide 3: No shadow -->
# <span class="no-shadow">No Shadow</span>
